query:
SELECT 
  c.id AS claim_id,
  c.claim_number,
  c.incident_type,
  c.incident_description,
  c.vehicle_make,
  c.vehicle_model,
  c.vehicle_year,
  c.vehicle_registration,
  c.status,
  c.created_at,
  a.id AS assessment_id,
  a.estimated_cost,
  a.damage_description,
  a.detected_damage_types,
  a.confidence_score,
  a.fraud_indicators,
  a.fraud_risk_level,
  a.fraud_score_breakdown_json,
  a.structural_damage_severity,
  a.damaged_components_json,
  a.physics_analysis,
  a.forensic_analysis,
  a.accident_type,
  a.structural_damage,
  a.inferred_hidden_damages_json,
  a.repair_intelligence_json
FROM claims c
LEFT JOIN ai_assessments a ON a.claim_id = c.id
WHERE c.vehicle_registration LIKE '%AEX%'
   OR c.vehicle_registration LIKE '%6208%'
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

FROM claims c

   OR c.vehicle_registration LIKE '%6208%'

rows.incident_description: Vehicle sustained damages on the RHS Tail Lamp, Rear Bumper, Rear Bumper Sensors, Front Bumper Slides, Grille, Diff Connectors, Front Bumper, Tow Hinge, Tail Gate, RHS Loading Panel, Radiator Support Panel and Rear End Piece. Excluded Tail Gate Locks and Inner Front Bumper Frame as not accident related.
rows.damage_description: Isuzu D Teq (2013). Vehicle sustained damages on the RHS Tail Lamp, Rear Bumper, Rear Bumper Sensors, Front Bumper Slides, Grille, Diff Connectors, Front Bumper, Tow Hinge, Tail Gate, RHS Loading Panel, Radiator Support Panel and Rear End Piece. Excluded Tail Gate Locks and Inner Front Bumper Frame as not accident related.. 12 damaged components identified.
